title: Anna University – Project Assistant – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Anna University (AU) has recruited 1 Project Assistant post. Candidates with First Class M.E./M.Tech. in Civil, Structural, or Construction Engineering and Management can apply through email until 23-05-2026 through the AU website, www.annauniv.edu.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class in M.E. / M. Tech. in Engineering or Technology(Civil / Structural / Construction Engineering and Management) from a recognized University or Equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
